1011010101000000010010001111111001101 - ASI: 19

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  001 = 0 * 01
  101 = 1 * 01
  0001 = 00 * 01
  0100 = 01 * 00
  1111 = 11 * 11
  10101 = 101 * 01
  000001 = 00 * 0001
  000111 = 0001 * 11
  001101 = 001 * 101
  10110101 = 101 * 10101
  001000111 = 001 * 000111
  0100000001 = 0100 * 000001
  1111001101 = 1111 * 001101
  101101010100000001 = 10110101 * 0100000001
  0010001111111001101 = 001000111 * 1111001101
  1011010101000000010010001111111001101 = 101101010100000001 * 0010001111111001101
